title: Mezze Meatball Hummus Bowl
summary: All the joy of a mezze platter in one high-protein bowl. Creamy hummus topped with leftovers from our Spicy Lamb Meatball Traybake, sweet roasted veg, zingy sumac onions and warm flatbread for scooping. Yum.

method.description: Make the Spicy Lamb Meatball Traybake.

Peel and finely slice the red onion. Add to a bowl with a pinch of salt and the sumac, then scrunch with your hands to soften. Set aside to marinate while you prep everything else. Pick the parsley leaves and stir them through the onions just before serving.

Add the tomato purée to a saucepan with a drizzle of olive oil. Set it over a medium heat and cook for 3–4 mins until darkened and sticky. Tip in the meatballs and roast veg, along with 100ml water. Simmer for a few mins until hot and slightly thickened. Taste and season with salt, if needed.
Spoon the hummus into shallow bowls and use the back of a spoon to spread it out. Top with the hot lamb mix and a generous pile of the sumac onions.
Warm the flatbreads in a dry pan or directly over a flame until soft and charred. Serve alongside for scooping.

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
